# Agent Routing

> GENERATED STATIC ROUTING ADAPTER. Do not edit manually. Rerender with `python scripts/render_agent_docs.py`.

Secondary generated adapter. Prefer `AGENTS.md`, then `tools/AGENT_QUICKSTART.md`.

## Use

- Read `AGENTS.md` first.
- Use `tools/AGENT_QUICKSTART.md` for the ordinary startup path.
- Run `uv run agentic-workspace implement --profile tiny --changed <paths> --format json` when paths are known; otherwise run `uv run agentic-workspace start --profile tiny --task "<task>" --format json`.
- Run `uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json` when active planning state matters.

## Boundary

- This file is compatibility routing only, not doctrine or state.
- Open raw planning, memory, or contract files only when compact commands point there.
